title: A booming market built on misconceptions?
summary: The gluten-free (GF) boom shows no signs of slowing, but is it really the healthier choice or just clever marketing? Despite the premium price tag, studies reveal that many GF baked goods contain more sugar, fewer nutrients and even hidden contaminants, raising serious questions.
